findings.title: headroom: Compressão de Tool Output para LLM — 60-95% Menos Tokens, Mesmas Respostas
findings.reason: Open-source library for compressing tool outputs/RAG chunks before sending to LLMs. Saves context window space and API costs. pip install headroom.

findings.title: microsoft/VibeVoice: Voz Sintética de Fronteira em Código Aberto — Concorrente do ElevenLabs?
findings.reason: Microsoft open-source TTS system with emotion, voice cloning, multi-language. Can replace Edge TTS in Hermes with local execution.

findings.title: Agent-Reach: CLI sem API Fees para Ler e Buscar Twitter, Reddit, YouTube e GitHub
findings.reason: CLI for AI agents to access social media via web scraping without paid APIs. Perfect for Hermes research agents.

findings.title: MemPalace: Sistema de Memória Open-Source com Melhores Benchmarks para Agentes de IA
findings.reason: Open-source memory system for agents with vector store, hierarchical summarization, and intelligent caching. Top benchmarks.

findings.title: PROJECTMEM: Camada de Memória Local com Event Sourcing para Agentes de Código
findings.reason: Design pattern for event-sourced agent memory. Currently covered by mempalace skill which offers more complete implementation.

findings.title: Open Reproduction of DeepSeek-R1: Reprodução Aberta do Modelo de Raciocínio
findings.reason: HuggingFace open-r1 reproduction. Training-oriented. Not directly implementable as a Hermes skill but valuable for ML research.

findings.title: open-notebook: Implementação Open-Source do NotebookLM com Mais Flexibilidade
findings.reason: Local document analysis tool. Useful but overlaps with existing RAG capabilities.

findings.title: OpenEnv: Ambiente Open-Source para Aprendizado por Reforço de Agentes
findings.reason: RL environment for agent training. Training-oriented, less relevant for inference-side Hermes improvements.

findings.title: last30days-skill and taste-skill: Ferramentas para Agentes de IA Mais Inteligentes e com Estilo
findings.reason: Overlaps with existing 'humanizer' skill (removes AI-isms from text). Different approach (few-shot prompting).
